title: revise_input
description: Schema for the JSON payload that the active template's prompts/revise.md produces and that bin/revise.py consumes via --revise-json.

author.description: LLM's best-effort self-identification. Resolved author follows the unified precedence: --author CLI → LIVESPEC_AUTHOR_LLM env → this field → 'unknown-llm'.

modifications.description: Required when decision == 'modify'; the LLM's drafted modifications. Ignored otherwise.

resulting_files.description: When decision == 'accept' or 'modify', the spec files to update + their new content. Empty / omitted when decision == 'reject'.

path.description: Spec-target-relative path of the file to update (e.g., "contracts.md", NOT "SPECIFICATION/contracts.md"). The wrapper joins this to <spec-target>/ via Path /. Absolute paths (begin with /) and paths beginning with the spec-target's basename followed by / are rejected with UsageError (exit 2).

content.description: Full post-update content of the file. The target file MUST already exist at <spec-target>/<path> before the revise wrapper writes; non-existent targets raise PreconditionError (exit 3) since revise is for updating existing spec files only.
